properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I believe in a hope that's so secure In Your love that is no fear, salvation is sure I believe on the cross you took my pain All my sins are washed away, forgiven and free

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And now I see As You are, so are we

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let my life resound Your praise As an anthem of Your grace There is power in Your Name Hallelujah Jesus You Reign

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I believe I am righteous through the One Your obedience has won, I rest in all You've done I believe You are everything I need More of You and less of me, I fall at your feet

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: And now I see As You are, so we are

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Let my life resound Your praise As an anthem of Your grace There is power in Your Name Hallelujah Jesus!
